item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response notices the repeated pattern of adding people after each failure and moves partly upstream by asking for root-cause logging and an end-of-day process change. However, it still starts with acceptance and explicitly adds the fridge confirmer as today's action, rather than refusing the next manual gate as the default and consolidating/subtracting/automating the recurring failure. This is a partial brake, not a full anti-spiral intervention."}
